name: Bejeweled Twist
descr:
Spin, match, explode... WOW! It's a brilliant new way to play Bejeweled! Get set for a vivid sensory rush as you spin and match explosive gems for shockwaves of fun. Rotate jewels freely to set up electrifying combos, outwit surprising obstacles like Locks and Bombs, and create high-voltage Flame and Lightning gems. When you need to dial up the intensity or fine-tune your skills, turn to Challenge mode or five-minute Blitz. And if relaxing is more your style, kick up your feet with stress-free Zen. No matter the mode, you'll discover new strategies, improve your moves, and find endless ways to win!                    
 [list][li]Use the revolutionary Gem Rotator to move gems around and make matches anywhere on the board                     
 [/li][li]Relax, rev up, refocus or recharge in four game modes  Classic, Zen, Challenge and Blitz                    
 [/li][li]Clear away Locks and Bombs for magnificent bonuses                    
 [/li][li]Create Flame and Lightning power gems, then blast them to smithereens just because you can                    
 [/li][li]Relive your best moves with Instant Replay and see where you rank on the high-score list                    
 [/li][li]Start playing quickly and easily with in-game tips                    
 [/li][li]Enjoy eye-popping graphics and special effects... you've never seen Bejeweled like this before!                    [/li][/list]

【游戏简介】

Spin, match, explode... WOW! It's a brilliant new way to play Bejeweled! Get set for a vivid sensory rush as you spin and match explosive gems for shockwaves of fun. Rotate jewels freely to set up electrifying combos, outwit surprising obstacles like Locks and Bombs, and create high-voltage Flame and Lightning gems. When you need to dial up the intensity or fine-tune your skills, turn to Challenge mode or five-minute Blitz. And if relaxing is more your style, kick up your feet with stress-free Zen. No matter the mode, you'll discover new strategies, improve your moves, and find endless ways to win!                    
 [list][li]Use the revolutionary Gem Rotator to move gems around and make matches anywhere on the board                     
 [/li][li]Relax, rev up, refocus or recharge in four game modes  Classic, Zen, Challenge and Blitz                    
 [/li][li]Clear away Locks and Bombs for magnificent bonuses                    
 [/li][li]Create Flame and Lightning power gems, then blast them to smithereens just because you can                    
 [/li][li]Relive your best moves with Instant Replay and see where you rank on the high-score list                    
 [/li][li]Start playing quickly and easily with in-game tips                    
 [/li][li]Enjoy eye-popping graphics and special effects... you've never seen Bejeweled like this before!                    [/li][/list]

【配置需求】

Windows
操作系统：
Windows XP/Vista
DirectX 版本：
DirectX 8 或者更高
处理器：
1.2GHz 处理器
内存：
256MB of RAM (512+MB 更好)
显卡：
兼容 DirectX
声卡：
兼容 DirectX
硬盘：
250MB

2024 年 1 月 1 日（PT）起，Steam 客户端将仅支持 Windows 10 及更新版本。
